title: Virgo September 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
excerpt: Virgo September 2026 horoscope: New Moon in Virgo (Sep 11, 1st house — your sign) + Aries Harvest Full Moon (Sep 26, 8th house). Birthday New Moon resets identity; the Harvest Full Moon reorganizes the depths. Crystal: Red Jasper.
rank_math_title: Virgo September 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Virgo September 2026 monthly horoscope — birthday New Moon in your sign, key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Red Jasper). New Moon Sep 11 in Virgo; Aries Harvest Full Moon Sep 26 (depths).
content:
Virgo September 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeBirthday reset, then reorganize the depths
Key DatesNew Moon Sep 11 (Virgo, 1st house — your sign) / Sun into Libra Sep 22 / Aries Harvest Full Moon Sep 26 (8th house)
Love1st house New Moon reinvents identity; the 8th house Full Moon deepens intimacy and shared resources
CareerPersonal reinvention drives the work early; shared money matters late
Crystal of the MonthRed Jasper
Lucky ColorsDeep forest, soft clay, warm sepia
Lucky Number1
AffirmationI begin the next personal year; I let the depths reorganize.

This Month's Energy

Virgo, September 2026 is one of the most important months of your year. The New Moon in Virgo on September 11 falls in your own sign — your 1st house of identity, body, name, and how you show up — a birthday reset of who you are. Then September 26 brings the Harvest Full Moon in Aries, falling in your 8th house of shared resources, intimacy, debts, and psychological depth — a climax or release around shared money, a deep bond, or a private transformation. September's pattern is: declare the new self early, then reorganize the depths late.

Key Dates for Virgo in September 2026

DateTransitMeaning for VirgoDo / Avoid
Sep 11New Moon in Virgo (your 1st house)Birthday New Moon in your own sign — a fresh start in identity, body, name, and how you show up. The personal new year begins.Do: declare the next chapter, change the look, take the new role, set the personal intention for the year
Avoid: postponing your own renewal to serve others
Sep 22Sun enters Libra (equinox)2nd house season — income, self-worth, material resources through late OctoberDo: set the rate, organize money, name what your work is worth
Avoid: undervaluing the new self
Sep 26Harvest Full Moon in Aries8th house — shared resources, intimacy, debts, depth climax; a turning point around shared money, a deep bond, or a private transformationDo: renegotiate shared money, address intimacy, settle the debt
Avoid: power struggles over shared resources
Sep 9Venus enters Scorpio (your 3rd)Warmth toward words, siblings, neighbors through October; conversations softenDo: write the letter, mend the sibling tie, host the conversation
Avoid: retreating into silence when words could mend
Sep 26–OctMars enters Capricorn5th house — romance, creativity, play, children become action zones through NovemberDo: make the art, go on the date, schedule the play
Avoid: postponing joy
Sep 4Mercury enters Virgo (your 1st)Your ruler moves to your sign — voice, identity, and personal direction sharpenDo: claim your voice, declare the new chapter, set up the new year
Avoid: shrinking from the new visibility

Career & Money

For Virgo, September's career story begins with personal reinvention. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 falls in your own sign — a birthday reset of identity that ripples into every work decision. Mercury (your ruler) entering Virgo on September 4 sharpens your voice and personal direction early month.

The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 falls in your 8th house of shared resources, intimacy, and joint finances — a climax around shared money, debts, investments, or a deep collaborative bond. Combined with the Sun entering Libra (your 2nd house of income) on September 22, the second half strongly favors money reorganization — both personal income and shared resources. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is declare the new self early, then settle the money late.

Love & Relationships

The Virgo New Moon on September 11 falls in your own sign — your 1st house of identity. For Virgo, this is the love signature of 2026's second half: a reinvention of self, and relationship follows identity. Single Virgos may attract a new kind of partner; partnered Virgos may redefine the terms.

The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 falls in your 8th house of intimacy, shared resources, and psychological depth — a climax around a deep bond, a shared financial decision, or a private transformation within a relationship. Mars entering Capricorn (your 5th house of romance) around September 26 opens playful, creative, romantic action through November. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting the new self lead, then letting the deep bond follow.

Health & Wellness

September is Virgo's wellness reset month. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 falls in your own sign —Virgo carries this directly through the gut, nervous system, and digestive rhythm. Commit to the daily practice (food, sleep, movement) on September 11 and the structure holds through the year.

Red Jasper, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with grounding, stamina, and gentle vitality — a near-perfect symbolic companion for an earthy sign doing a birthday reset. Mercury-ruled Virgo carries tension in the gut and nervous system; gentle digestion-friendly routines, walking, and screen-free mornings are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Red Jasper

Why Red Jasper fits Virgo this month. You are Mercury-ruled and September hands you a birthday New Moon in your own sign (1st house) plus a Harvest Full Moon in your 8th house (depths and shared resources). Red Jasper — traditionally tied to grounding, stamina, gentle vitality, and steady earth — is the stone that anchors Virgo's nervous-system sensitivity in the body. Where Clear Quartz would clarify and Amethyst would calm, Red Jasper grounds: dense, warm, slow, perfectly matched to earthy Virgo. The 1st house reset meets a stone that holds the root.

How to use it during September 2026. Hold Red Jasper over your root or sacral area for 5 minutes at sunrise on September 11 (your birthday New Moon). Carry it during any shared-resources or intimacy conversation in the days around September 26 (the 8th house Full Moon).

Best date to use it: September 11, the Virgo New Moon in your own sign — hold Red Jasper at your root for 5 minutes of breathing at sunrise, naming the new identity chapter you're ready to begin.

Read more: Red Jasper Meaning and Best Crystals for Virgo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Virgo — September 2026

When: September 11, the Virgo New Moon in your own sign.
Crystal: Red Jasper.
Intention: Begin the next personal year from the root.

  1. Cleanse Red Jasper under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of September 11.
  2. Set the intention on the 1st house theme: write down one identity declaration — who you are now, what the next personal year looks like. Make it specific.
  3. Act in the 48 hours following: take one outer step that matches the inner declaration (the new role, the new look, the new routine). Red Jasper in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26: what shared resource or deep bond needs to reorganize to support the new self? Hold Red Jasper at the root during the Full Moon.

Shop Virgo Crystals for September 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Virgo crystal guide for stones connected with grounding, focus, stamina, and healing — including the Red Jasper that anchors your birthday reset from the root. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Virgo September 2026

Is September 2026 a good month for Virgo?

It's a birthday-reset month. The Virgo New Moon on September 11 (your own sign) begins the next personal year. The Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 (your 8th house) reorganizes shared resources and intimacy.

How will the Virgo New Moon on September 11 affect Virgo?

It falls in your own sign — your 1st house of identity, body, name, and how you show up. Declare the next chapter; set the year's intention; begin the personal new year.

What does the Aries Harvest Full Moon on September 26 mean for Virgo?

It falls in your 8th house of shared resources, intimacy, debts, and psychological depth — a climax or release around shared money, a deep bond, or a private transformation.

What is the best crystal for Virgo in September 2026?

Red Jasper — it anchors the nervous-system sensitivity in the body during a birthday reset, exactly what a 1st house Virgo New Moon plus an 8th house Aries Full Moon demand. See the full Virgo crystal guide →

How does the August eclipse aftermath shape Virgo's September?

The August 12 solar eclipse in your 12th house closed a hidden chapter. September's Virgo New Moon in your own sign begins the next personal year from a cleaner foundation — the reset many Virgos feel around their birthday is especially clear in 2026.
